series_metadata.series_title: Education Training Records for Employees (Including Volunteers)
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with employee and volunteer training in various basic/instructor/instructor trainer level education and skills courses conducted or funded by the Division of Parks and Watercraft for water safety education, including, but not limited to: training notes or documentation, applications, certification records, etc. The training records cover various subjects/skills pertaining to safe boating, OPOTA 80-Hour Instructor Course, water/ice safety, and other forms of training for water safety education.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: records employment or contract with ODNR has ended ; Electronic: records employment or contract with ODNR has ended
